# Alpha Feedback

## Workflow Tried

- [ ] Recover
- [ ] Gate
- [ ] Verify CAR
- [ ] Explain CAR
- [ ] GitHub Action

## What Was Useful

Describe where the verdict, policy reason, missing proof, accountable next action, or CAR helped.

## What Was Confusing

Describe any wording, command, or proof output that slowed you down.

## Data Safety

Do not include secrets, tokens, private keys, raw source code, raw diffs, or customer production data.
